theme.name: Rookie Quest Sunset Tabletop
theme.description: A warm sunset tabletop system using espresso backgrounds, ember-brown cards, cream text, copper borders, and golden-orange actions. This replaces older cyber, blue, purple, and neon directions.

implementation_status.global_tokens: Mostly implemented in frontend/src/App.css root variables.
known_gaps: Some older docs and component-level styles still reference cyber, blue, purple, cyan, or neon treatments.
Each route should be visually checked at desktop and mobile widths before calling the rebrand complete.
Screenshots or a preview URL are needed for agent-side visual verification beyond source review.

rules: Use a shared sunset shell across player, GM, and character-builder pages.
Use gold/copper for primary actions and selected states.
Reserve red for destructive actions and errors.
Avoid old blue, purple, cyan, and neon glows.
Prefer sharp, minimal cards with readable cream text.
